signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been **confirmed and announced**[1]. This regulatory resolution represents the most significant catalyst affecting XRP predictions, as it removes a legal overhang that weighed on the token for approximately half a decade[1].
